title: Magnificently Gooey Peruvian Peanut Tart
description: A pungent and festive Peruvian dessert featuring peanut brittle, this tart is a perfect treat for any occasion, and is also FODMAP-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the peanut butter, confectioners sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, and salt until smooth.
Stir in the crushed peanut brittle.
Roll out the tart crust and place it in a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Pour the peanut butter mixture into the tart crust.
Bake the tart for 40 minutes, or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool completely on a wire rack.
Drizzle the heavy cream over the top of the tart before serving.
Refrigerate the tart for at least 2 hours before serving.
